resultList.dtldesc: Property Details::This 2 BHK flat for sale in Cybercity Marina Skies located in Hitech City Hyderabad offers a modern lifestyle in one of the most sought after residential and IT hubs of the city. The apartment is situated on the twenty first floor of a thirty four floor high rise tower which provides impressive city views and a peaceful living environment above the urban activity. With a super built up area of about 1160 square feet the property is thoughtfully designed to provide comfortable living space for families and working professionals. The flat is available for resale and is ready to move making it a convenient option for buyers who wish to shift immediately. Priced at around one crore twenty nine lakh the property represents a premium residential opportunity in a well known residential project developed by Cybercity Builders and Developers.::::Property Specifications::The apartment features two spacious bedrooms designed to provide privacy and comfort for residents. It also includes two well designed bathrooms fitted with modern fixtures for everyday convenience. The living and dining area is planned to create a bright and welcoming atmosphere that can comfortably accommodate family gatherings and relaxation time. The flat includes one balcony that allows natural light and ventilation to enter the home while also offering pleasant views of the surrounding cityscape. The property is fully furnished which means essential furniture fittings and appliances are already available allowing the new owner to move in without additional setup. The apartment faces east which is considered highly favorable by many homebuyers and allows pleasant morning sunlight to enter the home.::::Facility::Cybercity Marina Skies is a premium residential project that provides residents with a comfortable and modern living environment. The high rise development offers well maintained common areas reliable power and water supply and efficient building management. Residents can enjoy secure living with controlled entry and a safe residential atmosphere. The tower structure also allows good airflow and natural lighting throughout the apartments. Being a newly constructed project the building reflects contemporary architectural design and modern construction standards which enhance the overall residential experience.::::Locality::Hitech City is one of the most prominent commercial and residential areas in Hyderabad known for its strong infrastructure and proximity to major IT companies and business parks. The location offers excellent connectivity to important parts of the city through well developed road networks and public transport options. Residents can easily access shopping malls educational institutions healthcare centers and entertainment hubs located within a short distance. With its combination of modern infrastructure convenience and vibrant urban lifestyle Hitech City remains one of the top residential destinations in Hyderabad.

resultList.dtldesc: This thoughtfully designed 3 BHK villa in Gowdavalli, Hyderabad offers a refined blend of comfort, space, and modern living within a well-equipped gated community. With elegant interiors, functional layout, and access to premium amenities, this property is ideal for families seeking a serene yet well-connected lifestyle.::::::::::::::::Property Specifications::::::::::::::::::::Sprawled across a plot area of 200 sq. yrd, this east-facing, Vaastu-compliant villa is structured across G+2 floors, with the second floor dedicated to an open terrace. The ground floor features a spacious open-plan living and dining area seamlessly connected to a modular kitchen equipped with cabinets, hob, granite platform, and stainless steel sink. This level also includes one bedroom with a walk-in dresser and an attached western-style bathroom. The first floor comprises an additional living space, along with two well-appointed bedrooms, both featuring walk-in dressers and attached bathrooms. One balcony on this floor provides a pleasant outdoor extension, while the ground floor offers a sit-out area alongside the covered car parking. The villa is internally connected via a staircase, which also includes useful under-stair storage.::::The home is semi-furnished with thoughtfully incorporated elements such as a modular kitchen, pooja unit, built-in cupboards, and two Italian wardrobes. Additional fittings include a poster bed in one bedroom, chest of drawers, fans, mosquito mesh on windows, and lighting fixtures across all rooms. The flooring throughout the villa is finished with vitrified tiles, maintaining uniformity and durability. All three bathrooms are western-style and fitted with geysers, supported by solar water heating for added efficiency.::::::::::::::::Facilities::::::::::::::::Residents benefit from a wide range of amenities within the gated community, including a clubhouse, swimming pool, landscaped garden, gym, yoga and meditation room, banquet hall, and dedicated sports facilities such as basketball, squash, and badminton courts. A toddler park ensures a family-friendly environment. Daily conveniences are well catered for with a supermarket and bank located within the premises. The villa also offers covered parking, 100 percent power backup, round-the-clock security, and CCTV surveillance across internal roads, ensuring a safe and comfortable living experience.::::::::::::::::Locality::::::::::::::::Strategically located in Gowdavalli, the villa enjoys proximity to key lifestyle and commercial hubs. Reputed retail outlets such as Vijetha and Ratnadeep supermarkets, along with shopping destinations like Cineplanet Mall, Dmart, and Metro Cash and Carry, are easily accessible. Healthcare needs are served by KIMS Hospital, while employment hubs like Kandalakoya IT Park add to the area's appeal. Medchal Railway Station is located nearby, enhancing connectivity. The presence of essential facilities within and around the community makes this property a well-rounded choice for modern living.

resultList.dtldesc: Property Details::::An excellent opportunity to own a spacious 2 BHK independent house in the prime locality of Vanasthalipuram, Hyderabad. Situated in Subhadra Nagar Colony, this ready-to-move property is available directly from the owner with no brokerage involved. Spread across a carpet area of 1900 sqft, the residence is built on a highly desirable north-west corner plot and is offered at 2 crore. The property enjoys dual 30-foot road frontage, making it an ideal choice for both end-use and future investment.::::Property Specifications::::This semi-furnished home comprises two spacious bedrooms, two bathrooms, and three balconies that provide abundant natural light and ventilation. The house also includes a store room, adding to its functionality. Elegant vitrified and marble flooring enhances the interiors and offers a premium look. The north-west facing orientation is considered highly favorable and suitable for residential purposes. The property is built on freehold ownership and is ready for immediate possession.::::Facilities::::The residence offers two open car parking spaces and benefits from excellent ventilation due to its corner location. The dual-road frontage provides easy access and ample parking convenience. The semi-furnished setup allows buyers to move in immediately while offering flexibility for interior customization. The well-maintained property presents strong redevelopment potential and is suitable for families seeking a peaceful and spacious living environment.::::Locality::::Located at H.No. 5-4-1053, Subhadra Nagar Colony, Vanasthalipuram, Hyderabad, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to major parts of the city. Rythu Bazar Vanasthalipuram is located nearby, ensuring easy access to fresh produce and daily essentials. Schools, hospitals, supermarkets, banks, and restaurants are all within close proximity. The locality is well connected through major roads and public transport, making commuting convenient. With its strategic location, wide roads, and growing infrastructure, Vanasthalipuram remains one of Hyderabad's preferred residential destinations and a promising investment location.
